arts.ttl: Liverpool face 'more difficult' test up next after Real Madrid and Man City wins
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is wary of the threat posed by Newcastle despite the Magpies winning just two of their last nine Premier League games ahead of their clash on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Athletic: why isn’t Vinícius Júnior playing?
arts.sum: Aurélien Tchouaméni is in contention to make his comeback from injury when Real Madrid take on Athletic Club at San Mamés, where Carlo Ancelotti may opt to field Los Blancos in a 4-4-2 formation . Following Éder Militao’s serious knee injury last month, Tchouaméni had been expected to fill in for the Brazilian at center-back once he returned; however, 21-year-old Raúl Asencio has impressed in central defense Tchouaméni’s absence, and looks likely to start alongside Antonio Rüdiger once more against Athletic.

arts.ttl: Team News: Athletic Bilbao vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's La Liga clash between Athletic Bilbao and Real Madrid.

“The altruism of a great talent like Mbappe is an act that we value very much because it means that the one who could be the greatest talent in football is putting himself at the service of the team. After Real Madrid’s 2-0 win over Getafe, Spanish television programme El Chiringuito suggested that Mbappe was a “coward” for stepping back from penalty responsibilities, but Ancelotti has refuted such claims.

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid make decision on January pursuit of Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Real Madrid have made a decision regarding their transfer pursuit of Liverpool and England defender Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Athletic Club - La Liga

arts.ttl: Will Aurélien Tchouaméni play for Real Madrid vs Athletic Club in LaLiga?
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni is set to return to action tomorrow, as Los Blancos visit Athletic Club in the first of five straight games on the road for the Spanish and European champions . Athletic Club and Real Madrid meet tomorrow, Wednesday December 4, on matchday 19 of the 2024/25 LaLiga season.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer preference crystal clear
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is one of three Liverpool players who are are set to leave on a free transfer as things stand along with Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk - and Real Madrid are hoping to snap him up
